notes: Automated SOA management and governance; >80% of Best-in-Class use third-party software for this; about 25% of Global 10000 employing design-time governance
Includes ESB monitoring, service-aware capacity planning, crash debugging, SLA management for loosely coupled services
50% of companies using SOA Lite without ESB middleware; 30% Enterprise SOA with core middleware
Mentioned as key integration technology alongside SOA; application lifecycle management component
75% of BIC organizations unhappy with current development tools and plan to supplement/replace within 6 months (from companion composite apps benchmark)
